records.question: Which departments are located in the Whitman building, have at least one course, have at least one instructor named Wieland with a salary of at least 124651.41, and have at least one student with at most 99 total credits?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name FROM department
JOIN course ON department.dept_name = course.dept_name
JOIN instructor ON department.dept_name = instructor.dept_name
JOIN student ON department.dept_name = student.dept_name
WHERE department.building = 'Whitman' AND instructor.salary >= 124651.41 AND instructor.name = 'Wieland' AND student.tot_cred <= 99
records.pred_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name
FROM department
JOIN course ON department.dept_name = course.dept_name
JOIN instructor ON department.dept_name = instructor.dept_name
JOIN student ON department.dept_name = student.dept_name
WHERE department.building = 'Whitman'
  AND instructor.salary >= 124651.41
  AND instructor.name = 'Wieland'
  AND student.tot_cred <= 99
GROUP BY department.dept_name
HAVING COUNT(course.course_id) > 0
  AND COUNT(instructor.ID) > 0
  AND COUNT(student.ID) > 0

records.question: What departments with courses, instructors, and students have a budget of at most 406557.93?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name FROM department
JOIN course ON department.dept_name = course.dept_name
JOIN instructor ON department.dept_name = instructor.dept_name
JOIN student ON department.dept_name = student.dept_name
WHERE department.budget <= 406557.93
records.pred_sql:
SELECT dept_name
FROM department
WHERE budget <= 406557.93
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM course WHERE course.dept_name = department.dept_name)
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM instructor WHERE instructor.dept_name = department.dept_name)
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM student WHERE student.dept_name = department.dept_name)

records.question: Which departments have a budget of 573745.09 and are located in Whitman, offering the Calculus course with 4 credits, and have a student named Szczerban with at most 97 total credits?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name FROM department
JOIN course ON department.dept_name = course.dept_name
JOIN student ON department.dept_name = student.dept_name
WHERE student.name = 'Szczerban' AND course.credits = 4 AND department.budget = 573745.09 AND department.building = 'Whitman' AND course.title = 'Calculus' AND student.tot_cred <= 97
records.pred_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name
FROM department
JOIN course ON department.dept_name = course.dept_name
JOIN student ON department.dept_name = student.dept_name
WHERE department.budget = 573745.09
  AND department.building = 'Whitman'
  AND course.credits = 4
  AND course.title = 'Calculus'
  AND student.name = 'Szczerban'
  AND student.tot_cred <= 97

records.question: Which departments are located in the Taylor building and have an instructor named Pingr earning at most 59303.62, along with students who have at most 95 total credits?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name FROM department
JOIN instructor ON department.dept_name = instructor.dept_name
JOIN student ON department.dept_name = student.dept_name
WHERE department.building = 'Taylor' AND instructor.name = 'Pingr' AND student.tot_cred <= 95 AND instructor.salary <= 59303.62
records.pred_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name
FROM department
JOIN instructor ON department.dept_name = instructor.dept_name
JOIN student ON department.dept_name = student.dept_name
WHERE department.building = 'Taylor'
  AND instructor.name = 'Pingr'
  AND instructor.salary <= 59303.62
  AND student.tot_cred <= 95
GROUP BY department.dept_name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT instructor.ID) >= 1
   AND COUNT(DISTINCT student.ID) >= 1

records.question: Which departments located in Linderman have a budget of at least 601283.6 and include an instructor named Konstantinides earning at most 32570.5?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name FROM department
JOIN instructor ON department.dept_name = instructor.dept_name
WHERE instructor.name = 'Konstantinides' AND instructor.salary <= 32570.5 AND department.budget >= 601283.6 AND department.building = 'Linderman'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name
FROM department
JOIN instructor ON department.dept_name = instructor.dept_name
WHERE department.budget >= 601283.6
  AND department.building = 'Linderman'
  AND instructor.name = 'Konstantinides'
  AND instructor.salary <= 32570.5
GROUP BY department.dept_name
HAVING COUNT(instructor.ID) >= 1

records.question: Which departments have a budget of at least 441840.92 and offer the 3-credit course titled Astronautics, where the instructor named Hau teaches and the student named Ashmi has at most 95 total credits?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name FROM department
JOIN course ON department.dept_name = course.dept_name
JOIN instructor ON department.dept_name = instructor.dept_name
JOIN student ON department.dept_name = student.dept_name
WHERE department.budget >= 441840.92 AND course.credits = 3 AND student.tot_cred <= 95 AND instructor.name = 'Hau' AND student.name = 'Ashmi' AND course.title = 'Astronautics'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name
FROM department
WHERE department.budget >= 441840.92
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM course
    WHERE course.dept_name = department.dept_name
      AND course.credits = 3
      AND course.title = 'Astronautics'
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM instructor
    WHERE instructor.dept_name = department.dept_name
      AND instructor.name = 'Hau'
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM student
    WHERE student.dept_name = department.dept_name
      AND student.tot_cred <= 95
      AND student.name = 'Ashmi'
  )
